description: kiho v5.22 + v5.23 runtime gates. PreToolUse chain-aware hook reads references/approval-chains.toml to decide whether a Write or Edit is authorized by a declared approval chain; blocks if the chain's certificate_marker is missing. SessionStart hook reminds the CEO to declare a tier. v5.23 refactored the two v5.22-era scripts (pre_write_agent.py, pre_write_kb.py) into a single chain-aware gate (pre_write_chain_gate.py) per committee approval-chains-2026-04-23; the old scripts are kept as deprecation stubs and are not referenced from this manifest. See plugins/kiho/bin/hooks/ and plugins/kiho/CHANGELOG.md.
